seo.title: Parahub — open-source civic platform without middlemen
seo.description: Open-source civic platform for P2P trade, Lightning payments, encrypted messaging, governance, and transit maps. Zero commissions. Join free.

hero.subtitle: Everything for life and work — directly, openly, commission-free.
hero.tagline: Market, finance, messaging, and logistics — in one app.

problem.title: Technology should liberate, not enslave.
problem.point1: Superapps take up to 30% commission, monopolize your data, and decide what you see.
problem.point2: Parahub is an open-source alternative: your data, your rules, zero commissions.
problem.point3: Reputation over ad budgets. Code is open — audit it, fork it, run your own node.

features.title: One app instead of a dozen.

id.title: ID & Reputation
id.desc: Build your reputation through personal endorsements from people who know you. No documents, no central authority — impossible to fake.

market.title: Market & Barter
market.desc: Buy, sell, or exchange directly. No money? The system finds multi-step swaps so everyone gets what they need.

finance.title: Bankless Finance
finance.desc: Prices in EUR/USD, instant payments with near-zero fees. No delays, freezes, or hidden charges.

governance.title: Contracts & Governance
governance.desc: Sign binding agreements in chat. Resolve disputes through community arbitration. Vote directly or delegate to someone you trust.

communication.title: Private Messaging
communication.desc: Fully encrypted messaging built in. Anti-spam: strangers pay a micro-fee for the first message.

mobility.title: Mobility & Maps
mobility.desc: Carpooling and public transit without aggregator fees. Real-time routes and vehicle tracking on community maps.

decentralization.title: Decentralization
decentralization.desc: Payments flow directly between people and messages are end-to-end encrypted. The code is yours to run — no one can lock you in.

opensource.title: Open Source
opensource.desc: Every line of code is public. Inspect it, improve it, or run your own independent copy of the platform.

offline.title: Offline-Ready
offline.desc: Community mesh networks keep neighbors connected even when the internet goes down.

mission.title: Cooperation Without Corporations.
mission.text: NGO from Portugal. Zero profit — only public infrastructure, sovereignty, and privacy.

cta.title: Try it yourself.
cta.text: Free. Open source. No email registration required.
